causal_question: How much did engaging in immigration-related lobbying in 2017 alter a firm's firm-year share of H-1B petitions denied between 2015 and 2017, relative to firms that did not lobby in 2017? (Report the effect in percentage points.)
vague_question: Did a firm's immigration-related lobbying in 2017 change the share of its H-1B visa petitions that were denied over the 2015-2017 period?
